name: Taj Mahal
description: UNESCO World Heritage monument in Agra and one of India's most recognized landmarks.

name: Qutub Minar
description: Historic minaret and archaeological complex in Delhi.

name: Mysore Palace
description: Grand royal palace known for Indo-Saracenic architecture and illuminated evenings.

name: Hawa Mahal
description: Jaipur's famous palace facade with distinctive honeycomb windows.

name: Meenakshi Amman Temple
description: Major Madurai temple complex known for colorful gopurams and active worship.

name: Marine Drive
description: Mumbai's sea-facing promenade for evening walks and skyline views.

name: Gateway of India
description: Mumbai waterfront monument close to ferry points and heritage hotels.

name: Chandni Chowk
description: Old Delhi market area known for street food, sweets, and historic lanes.
